title: Moderate Drinking Was Always a Lie
description: The idea that moderate drinking is harmless — or even heart-healthy — was never as solid as it seemed. A decade of industry-funded research, a statistical artifact called the J-curve, and a systematic misclassification of abstainers built a myth that served Diageo and Pernod Ricard far more than it served public health. New genetic evidence has dismantled it. This piece follows the money and the mechanism.
